parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Export scope: filtered (default, uses active filters), all, current_page, selected

parameters.name: content_mode
parameters.description: Content mode: summary (default, one row per product) or suppliers (one row per product-supplier)

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Comma-separated column keys to include. Omit for all columns.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Required when scope=selected. Comma-separated product IDs.

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Same filters as the products list endpoint apply to 'filtered' and 'current_page' scopes
